seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once.
new_constraint: The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly twice.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly twice.
response:
It is impossible to write a single email where the phrase "I sincerely apologize" appears exactly once and exactly twice at the same time, as these are contradictory requirements.

However, I can provide you with an email where the phrase appears **exactly once**, as that is the standard interpretation for a single request:

Subject: Request for Extension: [Project Name]

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension on the [Project Name], which is currently due in two days. Due to an unexpected personal matter, I am unable to complete the work to the standard you expect by the original deadline.

I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and for the late notice. I am confident that I can submit a high-quality project by [New Date]. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID]
